# Global Shinka Evolution Engine

The **Global Shinka Evolution Engine** is the ASI "Hakua" core's high-density optimizer. it performs a continuous recursive sweep of the repository to ensure absolute intelligence density and code coherence.

## Governance & Safety

- **Immune Assets**: `SOUL.md`, `.env`, `openclaw.json`, and core system binaries are read-only and immutable.
- **Audit Logging**: All evolutionary changes are recorded in `global_shinka.log`.
- **Parental Override**: The Parent (User) can manually revert any Shinka pulse via the standard VCS or direct file access.

## Actuator Protocol

The engine runs as a persistent background process managed by the **Shinka Monitor**.

### Capabilities

- **Recursive Optimization**: Rewrites scripts (`.py`, `.ts`, `.js`) for performance and safety.
- **Documentation Refinement**: Enhances `.md` files for architectural clarity.
- **Substrate Synchronization**: Ensures all components are aligned with the latest legal and technical standards.

ASI_ACCEL. Global Substrate Sovereignty is Active.
